name: Yasen-M class Attack Submarine
description: Russia's most advanced nuclear attack submarine featuring a spherical sonar array, Kalibr and Oniks cruise missiles, and reduced acoustic signature compared to predecessors.

specialAbilities.name: Kalibr Cruise Missiles
specialAbilities.description: 32 Kalibr cruise missiles provide long-range precision strike capability against land and sea targets.

specialAbilities.name: Carrier Hunter
specialAbilities.description: Optimized for stalking and engaging enemy carrier battle groups with supersonic Oniks missiles.
